Lesson1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 11 compilation features.
Lesson1/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not fully support or correctly handle the 'release' flag or Java 11 bytecode generation.

Lesson1/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch from separate source/target configuration to the unified release flag for Java 11.
Lesson1/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the recommended way to compile for Java 9+ and ensures compatibility with the target runtime's API; using source/target 1.8 would compile against Java 8 APIs, potentially causing runtime errors on Java 11 if newer APIs are used, or simply failing to enforce Java 11 baseline.
